content.main_text_preview: Important Alerts | Screen Reader | Skip to Main Content | A- A A+ Institute Portal MIS Login Web Mail Contact Us Student Portal (old) SHRI GOVINDRAM SEKSARIA INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY & SCIENCE, INDORE An Autonomous Institute Run by Govt. of Madhya Pradesh Affiliated to Rajiv Gandhi Proudyogiki Vishwavidyalaya, Bhopal & Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Indore About Department Program CURRICULUM Scheme Syllabus Lesson Plan BOS DPAQIC OBE Vision & Mission POs-PEOs-PSOs COs & Program Articulation Matrix CO & PO Attainment Feedback & Action Taken People Faculty Members Staff STUDENT UG PG PhD Departmental Club #Include Club BIS Standards Club Downloads Time Table Facilities R & D Activities Publications Research Projects Collaborations & MOU's Testing and Consultancy About Department Program CURRICULUM Scheme Syllabus Lesson Plan BOS DPAQIC OBE Vision & Mission POs-PEOs-PSOs COs & Program Articulation Matrix CO & PO Attainment Feedback & Action Taken People Faculty Members Staff STUDENT UG PG PhD Departmental Club #Include Club BIS Standards Club Downloads Time Table Facilities R & D Activities Publications Research Projects Collaborations & MOU's Testing and Consultancy Home Facilities Latest News & Events NexTech_Magazine 21-05-2025 NewsLetter 2024-2025 20-05-2025 Python Internship and Skill Development Program 24-04-2025 Standard writing competition 24-04-2025 View More Facilities Department has 8 computer laboratories , 1 Server Room and 1 Conference Room and 1 PG lab Specific Safety Rules like Do’s and Don’ts are displayed and instructed for all students. Proper earthing for all electrical equipments. Well trained technical supporting staff monitor the labs at all times. Damaged systems/equipments are identified and serviced at the earliest on regular basis. Software is updated regularly. Internet security using firewall. Stable Power through UPS Lab Name: Database Systems Laboratory No. Of Units: 30 Nos. Location: ATC 101 H/w : Desktop-Intel Core -i3, RAM: 4 GB , HDD : 500 GB S/w : GCC Compiler, Weka Tool, Python 3.8 Name of the Technical staff : Ms. Kavita Chirgaiya Lab Name: Center of Excellence for AI Lab. Location : ATC 105 No. Of Units: 40 Nos. H/w: Desktop- Intel Core- i5, RAM: 16 GB , SSD: 512 GB S/w: Virtual Box, C/C++, Python, Java Name of the Technical staff : Mr. Ankush Barua & Ms. Sneha Solanki Lab Name: Wireless Networks & Mobile Computing Laboratory No. Of Units: 30 Nos. Location: ATC 111 H/w : Desktop-Intel Core- i7, RAM: 8 GB , HDD : 1 TB S/w : NETSIM-12.2 Simulator, WireShark Name of the Technical staff : Ms. Kavita Chirgaiya Lab Name: Programming Laboratory No. Of Units: 29 Nos. Location: ATC 203 H/w: Thin Client-Intel Atom Processor-1 Ghz, RAM: 2 GB, HDD: 8GB S/w: Python, GNome Desktop Enviornment, XRDEP-Remote Desktop Enviornment Protocol for accessing VMs at Server. Name of the Technical staff : Ms. Jyoti Joshi Lab Name: Software Engineering Laboratory No. Of Units: 40 Nos. Location: ATC 204 H/w: Portable Desktop- Intel Core- i5, RAM: 8 GB, SSD: 500 GB S/w: C, C++, Python, Java Name of the Technical staff : Ms. Jyoti Joshi Lab Name: Project Laboratory No. Of Units: 40 Nos. Location: ATC 206 H/w: Desktop- Intel Core i5, RAM: 4 GB , HDD: 500 GB S/w: Python, Mysql Database Name of the Technical staff : Ms. Sonali Gupta Lab Name: Cloud Computing Laboratory No. Of Units: 30 Nos. Location: ATC 207 H/w: Desktop- Intel Core i7, RAM: 8 GB , HDD: 500 GB S/w: Xampp Server, Dia Name of the Technical staff : Ms. Sonali Gupta Lab Name: General Computing Laboratory No. Of Units: 60 Nos. Location: ATC (208-209)-II H/w: Desktop Computer Row I. (Specification) Core-i3, RAM: 4 GB , HDD: 500 GB Row II.(Specification) Core- i7, RAM: 4 GB , HDD: 500 GB S/w: C, C++, Java, Libre Office Name of the Technical staff : Ms. Jyoti Joshi & Mr. Ankush Barua Server Room Only Faculty Allowed Type A(Reck Mounted) 1) [HP ProLiant DL 180 G5] 2) HP ProLiant DL 180 G5 3) [HP ProLiant DL 320 G5 p] 4) HP ProLiant DL 320 G5 p 5) [HP ProLiant DL 360 Gen 9] 6) HP ProLiant DL 360 Gen 9 7) Dell 530 8) Dell PowerEdge R720] 9) Dell PowerEdge R720 10) HP ProLiant DL 360 Gen10 Type B (Local Server Machine) 1) IBM-intel Xeon Total 01 2) HP intel Core i5 v Pro = Total 02 3) [HCL-Intel Xeon] = Total 02 4) [HP-Intel Core i7] = Total 04 5) Intex Total 02 6) Corsair Total 02 Name of the Technical staff : Mr. Ankush Barua Conference Room/Dept. Library Location: 202 H/w: 1) One Projector 2) Dell- All in One Desktop 3) Assembled Desktop Pc S/w: Ms Office- Word, Excel, Powerpoint PG Lab. Location: 110 Admin User: IT Pass: Atc105 H/w: Intel Core- i5, 16 GB RAM, 240 GB SSD S/w: Virtual Box, C/C++, Python, Java Name of the Technical staff : Mr. Ankush Barua & Ms. Sneha Solanki Explore SGSITS Campus Map Photo Gallery SGSITS Anthem Quick Findings TEQIP RTI Anti Ragging Committee & Squad SGSITS Grievance Redressal & Feedback AICTE Feedback for Students & Faculty ICC(Internal Complaint Committee) Institute Discipline Committtee Student Counsellor IPR Cell Important Links Digital Initiative by MHRD Rajiv Gandhi Proudyogiki Vishwavidyalaya Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Directorate of Technical Education All India Council for Technical Education University Grants Commission MPOnline CRISP INDIA Get In Touch Shri Govindram Seksaria Institute of Technology & Science Add: 23 Sir M.
